name: West Virginia Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to West Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: West Virginia Board of Licensed Dietitians (WVBOLD)

address.description: 900 Lee Street, East, Suite 1000, Charleston, WV 25301

renewalCycle: Annual + 20 CE hours every two years

requiredDocuments.name: Official Application
requiredDocuments.description: Application form filled out accurately and completely, confirming age and citizenship.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Official College Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from the university showing your conferred degree (may be satisfied by CDR card, check with board).

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a West Virginia dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial license application fee is $69. A provisional permit application costs $46.

mainEntity.name: When does the West Virginia license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: West Virginia dietitian licenses are renewed annually. The renewal fee is $69.

mainEntity.name: What are the continuing education requirements for West Virginia?

acceptedAnswer.text: To maintain licensure, West Virginia requires 20 hours of continuing professional education (CPE) every two years.

mainEntity.name: Does West Virginia have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: West Virginia has enacted the Dietitian Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, dietitians still apply by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to West Virginia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in West Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
